Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: prior to any PRC securities regulator or stock exchange disclosure
blockchain-based green power certificate tokenization pilot
no public offering, no exchange trading, no marketing
reduce Scope 2 emissions by 35% within 24 months
Proposed Series C Preferred Shares Financing Term Sheet
closing conditioned on remediation completion and data compliance confirmations

Proposed Series C Preferred Shares Financing Term Sheet for Huilong Cloud Energy Technology Co., Ltd. (USCC 91310110MA3TY4Z21K), strictly confidential and constituting inside information prior to any PRC securities regulator or stock exchange disclosure.

Crypto/ESG pilot: The Company operates a confidential blockchain-based green power certificate tokenization pilot within the Nanhuan Industrial Park Sandbox; no public offering, no exchange trading, no marketing, and wallet key management must remain within segregated devices behind the information barrier.
Key terms: 1x non-participating liquidation preference, 6% non-cumulative dividend, broad-based weighted average anti-dilution, pro rata rights, and one Board seat for the Lead Investor.

Covenants and conditions: No-shop for 60 days, break fee RMB 9,000,000 upon breach, MAC includes revocation of critical ESG certifications or a material cyber breach recurrence, closing conditioned on remediation completion and data compliance confirmations.

Regulatory: Any offering documents or pre-IPO tutoring to be filed with the competent PRC securities regulator and relevant stock exchange; disclosures regarding the cyber incident and the tokenization pilot will be coordinated to avoid selective disclosure and to comply with inside information management rules.
